domains.description: Exhaustive list of every non-bulk JSON, registry, and markdown file under data-stfc-space (bulk: ships/*.json, hostiles/*.json only as patterns).
Upstream ship summary, per-ship detail (bulk), translations, ship_id_registry.
Upstream hostile summary and per-hostile detail (bulk).
Upstream starbase/building summary and starbase module translations.
Upstream research summary and per-node buffs.
Upstream officer summary and officer translation tables.
Shared {id,key,text} translation entry shape and cross-domain loca resolution.
